expectedIssues: Wrong Poker item is highlighted in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: The bottom navigation bar overlays the lower game cards, obscuring part of the content and making the page feel cut off.
Several horizontal rows are clipped on the right edge, including the top category chips and the game tiles, indicating overflow beyond the viewport.
Some text labels are truncated, such as 'Hot Ga...' in the top navigation, which makes the label look unfinished.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a wrong Poker item being highlighted in the bottom nav bar; they address layout/overflow problems instead.
